# clusters

A loose, un-named grouping of look-alike findings in the scatter view, the zoomed-out shape of your runs, vs an issue (one named, tracked problem). Dashboard: Monitoring (clusters).

**When to use:** "What patterns are emerging across my runs", reading the scatter/clusters view, or pulling cluster labels and member counts for an overview.

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `get-scatter` | `bentolabs clusters get-scatter` | raw plot points, every finding as an xy point, plus a center per cluster |
| `get-workspace` | `bentolabs clusters get-workspace` | active clusters summarized: label, member count, trend, sample quotes |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs clusters <command> --help`.
